title: Workflow Documentation
text:
Preface
This book describes my workflows.
It is accompanied by the unpublished supfuns package.

title: 1  Introduction
text:
This is a book created from markdown and executable code.
See Knuth (1984) for additional discussion of literate programming.

1 + 1

[1] 2






Knuth, Donald E. 1984. “Literate Programming.” Comput. J. 27 (2): 97–111. https://doi.org/10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97.

title: 2  Summary
text:
In summary, this book has no content whatsoever.

title: 2  Multiple Imputation
text:
For multiple imputation, we use the package mice (Buuren and Groothuis-Oudshoorn 2011).




Buuren, Stef van, and Karin Groothuis-Oudshoorn. 2011. “Mice: Multivariate Imputation by Chained Equations in r” 45: 1–67. https://doi.org/10.18637/jss.v045.i03.
